commit.message: [FLINK-31819][doc] Added documentations for advanced watermark features in sql
[FLINK-31819][doc] Added documentations for advanced watermark features in sql
[FLINK-24402][metric] Add a metric for back-pressure from the ChangelogStateBackend

files.patch: @@ -1632,7 +1632,7 @@ Note that the metrics are only available via reporters. Histogram - Task + Task numBytesInLocal Attention: deprecated, use }}#default-shuffle-service">Default shuffle service metrics. Counter @@ -1732,6 +1732,11 @@ Note that the metrics are only available via reporters. Maximum recorded duration of a single consecutive period of the task being in the hard back pressure state in the last sampling period. Please check softBackPressuredTimeMsPerSecond and hardBackPressuredTimeMsPerSecond for more information. Gauge + + changelogBusyTimeMsPerSecond + The time (in milliseconds) taken by the Changelog state backend to do IO operations, only positive when Changelog state backend is enabled. Please check 'dstl.dfs.upload.max-in-flight' for more information. + Gauge + mailboxMailsPerSecond The number of actions processed from the task's mailbox per second which includes all actions, e.g., checkpointing, timer, or cancellation actions.

@@ -1617,7 +1617,7 @@ Note that the metrics are only available via reporters. Histogram - Task + Task numBytesInLocal Attention: deprecated, use }}#default-shuffle-service">Default shuffle service metrics. Counter @@ -1717,6 +1717,11 @@ Note that the metrics are only available via reporters. Maximum recorded duration of a single consecutive period of the task being in the hard back pressure state in the last sampling period. Please check softBackPressuredTimeMsPerSecond and hardBackPressuredTimeMsPerSecond for more information. Gauge + + changelogBusyTimeMsPerSecond + The time (in milliseconds) taken by the Changelog state backend to do IO operations, only positive when Changelog state backend is enabled. Please check 'dstl.dfs.upload.max-in-flight' for more information. + Gauge + mailboxMailsPerSecond The number of actions processed from the task's mailbox per second which includes all actions, e.g., checkpointing, timer, or cancellation actions.
